channel.title: NPR Programs: All Things Considered
channel.description: All Things Considered hosts Ailsa Chang, Mary Louise Kelly, Juana Summers and Scott Detrow present the program's trademark mix of news, interviews, commentaries, reviews, and offbeat features 7 days a week.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: Man shot to death by ICE agent in southern Maine
item.description: A Colombian man was fatally shot by an ICE agent this morning in Biddeford, Maine. Sen. Angus King says he was told the man had "weaponized" his vehicle when the shooting occurred.
item.content:encoded: A Colombian man was fatally shot by an ICE agent this morning in Biddeford, Maine. Sen. Angus King says he was told the man had "weaponized" his vehicle when the shooting occurred.
item.dc:creator: Ari Snider

item.title: Pakistan urges restraint as its Mideast deal unravels
item.description: Pakistan urges restraint as Iran and the U.S. clash and a memorandum of understanding unravels.
item.content:encoded: Pakistan urges restraint as Iran and the U.S. clash and a memorandum of understanding unravels.
item.dc:creator: Diaa Hadid

item.title: The White House aims to give political appointees more power over research funding
item.description: Under Trump, the Office of Management and Budget has proposed a rule change that would shift authority for grant making to political appointees. Experts say it could negatively affect U.S. science.
item.content:encoded: Under Trump, the Office of Management and Budget has proposed a rule change that would shift authority for grant making to political appointees. Experts say it could negatively affect U.S. science.
item.dc:creator: Katia Riddle

item.title: 'Jurassic Park' actor Sam Neill dead at 78
item.description: Actor Sam Neill died Monday at the age of 78. He had a wide-ranging career over some 50 years — but is perhaps most well-known for his role as Dr. Alan Grant in the Jurassic Park franchise.
item.content:encoded: Actor Sam Neill died Monday at the age of 78. He had a wide-ranging career over some 50 years — but is perhaps most well-known for his role as Dr. Alan Grant in the Jurassic Park franchise.
item.dc:creator: Anastasia Tsioulcas

item.title: Checking in from a World Cup RV tour across America
item.description: The World Cup is down to its final four teams. CBS Sports' Nico Cantor checks in from his cross-country RV tour to break down the biggest storylines and what's next.
item.content:encoded: The World Cup is down to its final four teams. CBS Sports' Nico Cantor checks in from his cross-country RV tour to break down the biggest storylines and what's next.
item.dc:creator: Jason Fuller

item.title: Residents of historic North Nashville see redistricting as a new attempt at division
item.description: The redistricting carried out by Tennessee lawmakers divides a community of Black voters along the same line as highway split them up 60 years ago and they say it weakens their power once again.
item.content:encoded: The redistricting carried out by Tennessee lawmakers divides a community of Black voters along the same line as highway split them up 60 years ago and they say it weakens their power once again.
item.dc:creator: Marianna Bacallao

item.title: New Mexico low riders celebrate culture, push for a museum
item.description: Santa Fe is among many American communities that celebrate low rider culture. The cars are works of art and expressions of pride. At a parade, people talk about efforts to win funding for a museum.
item.content:encoded: Santa Fe is among many American communities that celebrate low rider culture. The cars are works of art and expressions of pride. At a parade, people talk about efforts to win funding for a museum.
item.dc:creator: Katerina Barton

item.title: Trump's HHS abandons threat to withhold Medicare and Medicaid funding over trans care
item.description: NPR has learned that the Department of Health and Human Services will not be finalizing its most aggressive attempt to end gender-affirming care for youth nationally.
item.content:encoded:
NPR has learned that the Department of Health and Human Services will not be finalizing its most aggressive attempt to end gender-affirming care for youth nationally.

(Image credit: Erik McGregor)
item.dc:creator: Selena Simmons-Duffin

item.title: Graham Platner's voters figure out what's next as candidates vie for their support
item.description: Maine voters are still grappling with Democratic Senate candidate Graham Platner's dramatic departure from the race.
item.content:encoded: Maine voters are still grappling with Democratic Senate candidate Graham Platner's dramatic departure from the race.
item.dc:creator: Tamara Keith

item.title: On foreign policy, Graham's influence may have been felt the most
item.description: Over the course of his three decades in Congress, Lindsey Graham was a major influence on Capitol Hill and throughout the world as one of the most vocal advocates for U.S. military might.
item.content:encoded: Over the course of his three decades in Congress, Lindsey Graham was a major influence on Capitol Hill and throughout the world as one of the most vocal advocates for U.S. military might.
item.dc:creator: Barbara Sprunt
